title: Go behind real crimes, not missing cows: Karnataka High Court pulls up police
description: The Karnataka High Court on Monday took exception to State police pursuing trivial matters instead of dealing with serious offences [Mangalamma and ors v. State of Karnataka].Justice M Nagaprasanna took exception to the fact that the police had registered a crime over two cows that had gone missing two years back. “You leave the cows' investigation. Go behind the real crimes. Why did you register this crime? On the allegation that two years back, two cows were missing, you registered the crime,”
